description_long: This is a twin-engine, propeller-driven military-style airplane with a camouflage paint scheme in shades of tan, brown, and green, accented by orange and black triangular markings on the wings and tail. The aircraft features a mid-mounted straight wing configuration with engines mounted on each wing, and a distinctive twin-boom fuselage leading to a horizontal stabilizer connecting two vertical tails. The nose is rounded and houses the cockpit, which is positioned at the front of the central fuselage and appears to be enclosed. The propellers are located at the front of each engine nacelle, and the undercarriage is not visible, suggesting either retracted or non-modeled landing gear. The overall design is reminiscent of World War II-era reconnaissance or light bomber aircraft, with a robust and utilitarian appearance suitable for rugged environments.
description: A twin-engine, camouflage-painted military airplane with a mid-mounted straight wing, twin-boom tail, and enclosed forward cockpit. Features include propellers, orange-black markings, and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the twin-boom tail, mid-mounted wings, and both propeller engines with camouflage and orange-black markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal tailplane, and the full wingspan with visible camouflage pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the twin-boom tail and engine nacelles.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded nose, forward cockpit, both propellers, and the straight wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or anhedral angle, no winglets, and engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines, one mounted on each wing with front-facing propellers.
attribute_tail_design: Twin-boom tail with two vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer (H-tail configuration).
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; configuration indeterminate from images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit located at the nose of the central fuselage, likely multi-seat with a clear canopy.
